question: Return a table showing the discount summary by device_type, with columns device_type, gross_revenue, total_discount_amount, and discount_rate_pct.
sql_query:
SELECT o.device_type,
       SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS gross_revenue,
       SUM(oi.discount_amount) AS total_discount_amount,
       CASE WHEN SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE (SUM(oi.discount_amount) / SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price)) * 100
       END AS discount_rate_pct
FROM core.orders AS o
JOIN core.order_items AS oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
GROUP BY o.device_type
ORDER BY o.device_type
pandas_sql_query: SELECT o.device_type, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS gross_revenue, ROUND(SUM(oi.discount_amount), 2) AS total_discount_amount, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(oi.discount_amount) / NULLIF(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 0), 4) AS discount_rate_pct FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi USING (order_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY discount_rate_pct DESC, device_type
diff_preview: At positional index 0, first diff: tablet != desktop
